uplink.description: Thermostat uplink: temperature + humidity -> climate (+ setpoint/valve extras)
uplink._note: Upstream-example input (TTN milesight-iot wt304 codec yaml, Apache-2.0). expected.data via the ported Milesight TLV decoder (oracle). temperature->air.temperature, humidity->air.relativeHumidity (climate); target temperature / control / valve status as camelCase extras.
